data.title: SEC to Vote on Tokenized Securities Proposal
data.description:
The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is set to vote on recommendations regarding the tokenization of equity securities, as announced by SEC Chairman Paul S. Atkins during an Investor Advisory Committee meeting. According to Foresight News, the SEC is expected to soon consider an innovative exemption aimed at facilitating limited trading of certain tokenized securities, while also focusing on developing a long-term regulatory framework.

Over the past thirteen months, the cryptocurrency working group has conducted multiple roundtable discussions, engaging with hundreds of market participants. The group has sought extensive public feedback and received numerous written opinions to understand how best to adjust regulations to accommodate new types of trading. The SEC continues to welcome suggestions on the design of potential innovative exemption schemes.

data.title: A newly created wallet withdrew 720 BTC from Binance, worth over $50 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a newly created wallet withdrew 720 BTC from Binance, worth $50.14 million.

data.title: Stock Market Winners and Losers Identified
data.description: The stock market today saw a mix of winners and losers as investors navigated various economic factors. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the day's significant movements and trends. Analysts noted that certain sectors experienced gains, while others faced declines due to shifting market dynamics. Investors are closely monitoring these changes to adjust their portfolios accordingly. The market's performance reflects ongoing economic uncertainties and investor sentiment. As the trading day progresses, market participants remain vigilant, assessing potential impacts on their investments.

data.title: Angola's Central Bank Maintains Interest Rate Amid Oil Price Surge
data.description: Angola's central bank has decided to keep its benchmark interest rate steady at 17.5%. Bloomberg posted on X, this marks the first pause since August, following a significant increase in oil prices due to the ongoing conflict involving the US, Israel, and Iran. The decision reflects the bank's response to the current economic conditions influenced by geopolitical tensions.

data.title: Ethereum Address Poisoning Losses Surge Post-Fusaka Upgrade
data.description: Ethereum address poisoning losses have significantly increased following the Fusaka upgrade, according to NS3.AI. A researcher reported that losses rose from $4.9 million before the upgrade to $63.3 million afterward. The study also found that the daily volume of poisoning transactions increased from approximately 30,000 to 167,000 after gas costs were reduced by six-fold. Additionally, recent losses after the study period contributed nearly $900,000 from 91 victims by March 9.

data.title: The Trump administration plans to suspend the Jones Act in an effort to stabilize oil prices.
data.description: According to market sources, the Trump administration plans to suspend the Jones Act in an effort to stabilize oil prices. (Jinshi)

data.title: CFTC Seeks Public Input on Event Contracts in Prediction Markets
data.description:
The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has issued an Advance Notice of Proposed Rulemaking (ANPRM) to gather public feedback on the necessity of modifying or introducing new regulations for event contracts in prediction markets. According to Foresight News, the ANPRM explores several key issues, including the application of statutory core principles and commission regulations to prediction markets, the types of event contracts that may be prohibited due to public interest concerns, and the cost-benefit considerations related to prediction markets.

The commission intends to use the information and opinions received to guide potential future actions, such as rulemaking, to address issues in prediction markets. Written comments must be submitted within 45 days from the publication date of the ANPRM in the Federal Register. Submissions can be made through the CFTC's public comment portal.

data.title: German Chancellor Advocates AI-Driven Data Analysis for Police
data.description: German Chancellor Merz has called for empowering the country's police forces with the ability to conduct automated data analysis using artificial intelligence for specific purposes. According to Jin10, this move is aimed at enhancing the efficiency and effectiveness of law enforcement in Germany. The proposal underscores the growing importance of AI in modern policing, as authorities seek to leverage technology to address complex challenges. Chancellor Merz's statement highlights the potential benefits of AI in improving public safety and security, while also raising questions about privacy and data protection. The initiative reflects a broader trend of integrating advanced technologies into governmental operations to better serve the public.

data.title: PayPay ADRs Debut on Nasdaq with Strong Opening Price
data.description: PayPay's American Depositary Receipts (ADRs) began trading on the Nasdaq with an opening indication price of $20. According to Jin10, this price is notably higher than the initial public offering (IPO) price of $16, reflecting strong investor interest in the company's market debut.

data.title: Both WTI and Brent crude oil prices continued to rise in the short term, with WTI crude oil reaching $96 per barrel.
data.description: According to Gate data, both WTI and Brent crude oil prices continued to rise in the short term. WTI crude oil touched $96 per barrel, up 8.55% on the day; Brent crude oil is currently up 7.1% at $98.04 per barrel.

data.title: The "lobster installation craze" has led to price increases and shortages in the market for related hardware equipment.
data.description: As the popularity of OpenClaw AI agents continues to rise, the "Lobster installation craze" has also led to price increases and shortages in the related hardware market. At a secondhand equipment wholesale stall in Shenzhen's Huaqiangbei Electronic World, a reporter observed five or six groups of customers inquiring about hardware compatible with the OpenClaw installation environment within just 20 minutes. One consumer explained, "I came all the way from Guizhou today specifically to buy the host box for 'Lobster,' but I've been to several stores, and they're all out of stock, and prices are constantly rising." The reporter visited several secondhand wholesalers, and the response was always the same: out of stock. "There are still quite a few people asking, but the key is that there's no stock. It used to cost over 3,000 yuan, but now it seems like it's going to increase by 1,000 yuan." (CCTV Finance)

data.title: German Chancellor Merz: No Evidence of Increased Domestic Threat Amid Iran Conflict
data.description: German Chancellor Merz stated that there is no evidence indicating an increased domestic threat in light of the ongoing conflict involving Iran. According to Jin10, Chancellor Merz emphasized that the current situation does not suggest any heightened risk within Germany. The statement comes amid international concerns over the potential implications of the conflict on global security. Chancellor Merz reassured the public that the government is closely monitoring the situation and remains vigilant to any developments that may affect national security.

data.title: Crypto Whale Places Large Bearish Bet on Crude Oil
data.description: A significant transaction has been reported in the cryptocurrency market, involving a crypto whale who deposited 3.6 million USDC into the Hyperliquid platform. According to NS3.AI, the individual used these funds to open a 20x leveraged short position on crude oil. This move is seen as a substantial bearish bet on the oil market, executed through the Hyperliquid derivatives platform.

data.title: Citigroup Raises Brent Crude Forecast Amid Intensifying Iran Conflict
data.description: Citigroup has increased its quarterly forecast for Brent crude, projecting that the oil benchmark could reach between $80 and $100 in the short term. According to NS3.AI, this adjustment is attributed to the escalating conflict in Iran, which is contributing to market volatility and uncertainty. The ongoing tensions in the region are expected to impact oil prices significantly, as geopolitical factors play a crucial role in shaping market dynamics.

data.title: A whale/institution withdrew 348.3 BTC from Binance, accumulating 1720.2 BTC in the past nine days.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, a whale/institution withdrew 348.3 BTC from Binance. In the past 9 days, he has accumulated a total of 1,720.2 BTC (US$120 million) through Binance, at an average price of US$69,527.

data.title: Hungarian Opposition Leader Rallies Against Battery Plants Ahead of Election
data.description: Hungarian opposition leader Peter Magyar organized rallies in several towns hosting contentious battery plants, aiming to garner support ahead of a crucial election. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the significance of these rallies as Magyar seeks to challenge the current administration's policies on industrial development. The battery plants have been a point of contention, with local communities expressing concerns over environmental impacts and economic implications. Magyar's campaign focuses on addressing these issues and advocating for sustainable development practices. The upcoming election is seen as pivotal for Hungary's future direction, with the opposition leader emphasizing the need for change in the country's approach to industrial projects.

data.title: EURC Dominates Euro Stablecoin Market Amid Limited DeFi Liquidity
data.description: Circle's EURC stablecoin is at the forefront of the €1.06 billion euro stablecoin market. According to NS3.AI, this segment represents a mere 0.35% of the total DeFi stablecoin supply. Over the past year, EUR stablecoin swaps amounted to $3.17 billion, in stark contrast to the $3.20 trillion swapped for USD stablecoins, highlighting the limited euro liquidity within the DeFi space.

data.title: Commander of the Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy: We will adhere to the strategy of closing the Strait of Hormuz.
data.description: The commander of the Iranian Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy stated that, in response to the Supreme Leader's instructions, they will adhere to the strategy of closing the Strait of Hormuz. (Jinshi)

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Highlights Ethereum's Core Value Beyond Smart Contracts
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin recently shared insights on the X platform, emphasizing that Ethereum's fundamental value lies not in its smart contract or payment functionalities, but as a public 'bulletin board' supporting data availability for cryptographic protocols. According to Odaily, Buterin noted that many cryptographic protocols, such as secure online voting, software version control, and certificate revocation, require a public data space. Ethereum's upgraded PeerDAS mechanism can enhance data availability by 2.3 times, with potential for further improvement by 10 to 100 times.

Buterin also highlighted Ethereum's role in payments, Sybil attack resistance, and smart contract security deposits, positioning it as a core component of a decentralized, private, and secure open-source technology stack. He described Ethereum as a 'global shared memory,' with low fees and scalability improvements expected to drive its application in DeFi and other potential scenarios.

data.title: Romania to Support Measures Lifting EU Aid Blockade on Ukraine
data.description: Romanian President has announced that Romania will back all legitimate measures aimed at lifting the blockade on European Union aid to Ukraine. According to Jin10, this statement underscores Romania's commitment to supporting Ukraine amidst ongoing geopolitical tensions. The move is seen as part of broader efforts to ensure that EU assistance reaches Ukraine, which has been facing significant challenges. Romania's stance aligns with the EU's strategic interests in the region, emphasizing the importance of solidarity and support for Ukraine in its current situation.
